headline: Ciena Soars 182% in 6 Months: Should Investors Buy the Stock Now?
summary: CIEN has surged 178% on booming AI and cloud demand, with strong growth drivers and rising estimates signaling potential for further upside.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Arista Networks, Raises Price Target to $200
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Samik Chatterjee   maintains Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $190 to $200.

headline: Arista Networks Inc. (NYSE:ANET) Emerges as a Top CAN SLIM Growth Stock
summary: Arista Networks (ANET) exemplifies the CAN SLIM investing method, showing strong earnings growth, high relative strength, and leadership in cloud/AI networking.
